creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #12)
FYI, I still fail to find a combination of patches that fixes build on
13, 12 and 11.3, both amd and i386.

The latest test is:

https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/wkhtmltopdf-curi.txt

with 13-i386. Jonathan is trying to find solutions, but I fail to reproduce them 8-(
